phrases.text_local: Onde fica a exposição de cerâmica mourisca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh moow-REESH-kuh?

likely_response.local: Siga a sinalização para a exposição de cerâmica mourisca.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN PUH-ruh AH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh moow-REESH-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Moorish ceramics display.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Moorish ceramics display.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN PUH-ruh AH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh moow-REESH-kuh.
responses.french: Siga a sinalização para a exposição de cerâmica mourisca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman amphorae collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a coleção de ânforas romanas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH AHNNG-foo-ruhsh roo-MAHN-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museum staff typically provide concise, direct directions without extra phrasing.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vigilante ou ao curador.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-zhee-LAHNNG-tih OHW OW koo-ruh-DOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the guard or the curator.

responses.english: Ask the guard or the curator.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-zhee-LAHNNG-tih OHW OW koo-ruh-DOHR.
responses.french: Pergunte ao vigilante ou ao curador.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a galeria dos mosaicos romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH guh-lih-REEUH DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a galeria dos mosaicos romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH guh-lih-REEUH DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman mosaics gallery.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman mosaics gallery.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH guh-lih-REEUH DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a galeria dos mosaicos romanos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Visigothic jewelry case is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde fica a vitrine de joias visigóticas?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH veet-REE-nih DIH ZHOYUHSH vee-zee-GAW-tee-kuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Visigothic pieces are delicate; avoid touching the glass to preserve the display.

likely_response.local: Na sala de joias visigóticas, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH SAH-luh DIH ZHOYUHSH vee-zee-GAW-tee-kuhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the Visigothic jewelry room, on the right.

responses.english: In the Visigothic jewelry room, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NUH SAH-luh DIH ZHOYUHSH vee-zee-GAW-tee-kuhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Na sala de joias visigóticas, à direita.
